Co-Host Guidebook
📍
Bookings
Where every reservation lives
What it does
Every guest reservation goes here. Dates, payment, unit, notes — all in one place.
How to add a new booking
1
Guest books → you receive a DOR message
2
Tap + Add Reservation
3
Paste the DOR → fill in the details
4
Set the payment status → Save
DOR Examples & Situations
✅ Fully Paid
Seleena 22 reserved for you June 5th Thursday ( 1 night ) ✅
Paid KD 55
+965 9986 4744
Khalid
🟠 Pay Later / Pending
Fateema 34A reserved for you June 6th Friday ( 1 night )
Payment Pending KD 45
+965 9871 2233
Mohammad
📅 Extended Stay
Tower 62 - 1601 reserved for you June 7 - June 9 ( 2 nights )
Paid KD 120
+965 9553 8810
Sara
⏲ Half Paid
Jaseem 27 reserved for you June 8th Saturday ( 1 night )
Paid KD 35
Payment Pending KD 10
+965 9321 6678
Ali
📅
Schedule
Cleaning tasks for every unit
What it does
Tracks which units need cleaning and when. Cleaners, supervisors, and co-hosts all use this to stay in sync.
How to use it — step by step
1
Copy yesterday's reservation list → tap Paste in Schedule
2
Units needing cleaning today will appear
3
Send Alan's pre-set WhatsApp — already written, just tap send
4
Do the same for other cleaners & supervisors
5
Update task status throughout the day
‼️
Payment Pending
Your unpaid guest alert list
What it does
Shows all guests who haven't paid yet. Updates automatically from Bookings — nothing to add manually.
What to do
1
Check this tab every morning
2
If a guest is checking in today — call or message about payment immediately
3
Once paid → go to Bookings → update status to Paid or Cash
4
They will disappear from this tab automatically
👥
Guest Tracker
Profiles, history & loyalty
What it does
Guest history, contact details & loyalty tier — all saved here. Helps you treat returning guests better.
How to add or update a guest
1
Search the guest — returning guests are already here
2
New guest? Tap + Add Guest → name & number
3
After every stay → open profile → add a quick note
4
Loyalty tier updates automatically with each stay
💰
Cash in Hand
Cash from guests, cleaners & supervisors
What it does
Log all cash here — from guests, cleaners, and supervisors like Jonathan. Every KD must be recorded.
How to log a cash entry
1
Tap + Add Entry
2
Enter name, amount, and date
3
Guest cash? Also update Bookings → status to Cash
4
Cleaner/supervisor holding cash? Add their name & amount
💰 Example entries
• Jonathan — KD 75 cash (guest payment for unit 22, June 8)
• Seleena — KD 55 cash paid at door
• Supervisor Ahmad — KD 120 collected, to be handed over
Key Messages
💲
💲 When guest bargains price
The price I've shared is already the best I can offer, considering the quality, cleanliness, and amenities provided in the apartment. I always try to keep it fair for the experience I'm offering.
🙌
🙌 When guest asks for anything
Don't worry, let me check what I can do. I'll definitely try my best to make it happen and will update you as soon as possible 😊
💰 Extra Charges
Add extra cleaning charges per apartment (e.g. deep clean, special request)
